failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and synthesized an incorrect answer: it said there were 9 options instead of 2 and cited a nonexistent record.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available bagged vacuum cleaners costing more than $591.59. The correct tool query was available and was executed at index 3, returning exactly 2 matching items with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At index 4, the Executor had this tool output but produced an answer claiming there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000, which directly contradicts the tool result and fabricates unsupported evidence.
